items.title: Research: Regulator dashboard
items.summary: Information and key performance indicators (KPIs) from 16 UK regulators, published quarterly as part of the UK government’s Regulatory Action Plan.

items.title: Promotional material: Employment Rights Act 2025: factsheets
items.summary: Further details on the measures included within the Employment Rights Act 2025.

items.title: Form: Department for Business and Trade College of Experts: registration of interest
items.summary: The Department for Business and Trade (DBT) is establishing a new College of Experts (CoE) and is inviting external specialists to register their interest joining the network.

items.title: Letting out a self-catering holiday home in England: rules and regulations
items.summary: Regulations you need to follow when letting out a self-catering, short-term holiday home in England.

items.title: Official Statistics: Trade and investment core statistics book
items.summary: A monthly snapshot of the UK’s trade and investment position, summarising trade statistics produced by ONS, HMRC, DBT and others.

items.title: Guidance: Local net zero: support for local authorities and communities
items.summary: Central government provides a range of support to help local authorities and communities to decarbonise.

items.title: Official Statistics: Trade and investment factsheets: latest update
items.summary: The most up to date snapshot of the UK’s trade and investment positions with trading partners overseas.

items.title: Decision: North Falls Offshore Wind Farm: development consent order, Planning Act 2008
items.summary: Decision on an application for an offshore wind farm by North Falls Offshore Wind Farm Limited.

items.title: Oil and gas: offshore environmental legislation
items.summary: Environmental regulations and guidance on offshore oil and gas exploration and production offshore gas unloading and storage and offshore carbon dioxide storage activities

items.title: Notice: Energy code manager standard licence conditions: determination notice
items.summary: The Secretary of State has determined the code manager standard licence conditions for the purposes of Sections 33(1) and 81(2) of the Utilities Act 2000.

items.title: Official Statistics: Trade union statistics 2025
items.summary: Provides information on trade union membership among employees in the UK estimated from the Labour Force Survey over the period 1995 to 2025.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Household Energy Efficiency Headline Release (quarterly data)
items.summary: Headline Household Energy Efficiency statistics under the Energy Company Obligation (ECO) and the Green Deal Framework.

items.title: Notice: Heat Pump Investment Accelerator Competition: round 2
items.summary: This competition provides grant funding for investments in the manufacture of heat pumps and strategically important heat pump components in the UK.

items.title: Official Statistics: Boiler Upgrade Scheme: April 2026
items.summary: Data monitoring the uptake of low carbon technologies on the Boiler Upgrade Scheme (BUS), including the installation of air source heat pumps, ground source heat pumps and biomass boilers.

items.title: Research: Fuel mix disclosure data table
items.summary: The data are for the disclosure period 1 April 2024 to 31 March 2025.

items.title: Official Statistics: Smart Meters: January to March 2026
items.summary: Quarterly statistics which show the number of smart meters installed by large energy suppliers in January to March 2026 and the total numbers of smart and non-smart meters operated by these suppliers at the end of March 2026.

items.title: Make Work Pay: misuse of non-disclosure agreements (NDAs)
items.summary: We are seeking views on proposals to prevent the misuse of non-disclosure agreements in cases of workplace harassment and discrimination.

items.title: Official Statistics: Social Housing Decarbonisation Fund: March 2026
items.summary: Data to monitor the installation of energy efficiency measures in domestic properties via the Social Housing Decarbonisation Fund (SHDF) scheme in England.

items.title: Bill that could nationalise British Steel takes first step through Parliament
items.summary: The Steel Industry (Nationalisation) Bill will take its first step through Parliament today with its First Reading.

items.title: Official Statistics: MCS certified domestic battery installation statistics - April 2025 to March 2026
items.summary: Data monitoring the installation of domestic batteries recorded on the Microgeneration Certification Scheme (MCS), including capacity and cost statistics.

items.title: Official Statistics: Solar PV cost data: 2025/26
items.summary: Official Statistics in Development which show information on the cost per kW of solar PV installed by month during the financial year 2025/26.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Solar PV deployment: April 2026
items.summary: Monthly deployment of solar photovoltaic capacity in the United Kingdom.

items.title: Capacity Market: proposed changes for Prequalification 2026
items.summary: We are seeking views on proposed changes to the Capacity Market (CM) for Prequalification 2026.

items.title: Capacity Market: proposals to integrate low carbon technologies and enhance delivery assurance ahead of Prequalification 2026
items.summary: We are seeking views on proposed changes to the Capacity Market (CM) for Prequalification 2026.

items.title: Capacity Market: Hydrogen to Power and interconnectors
items.summary: We're seeking views on enabling the participation of Hydrogen to Power in the Capacity Market and technical changes to setting interconnector de-rating factors.

items.title: Official Statistics: Trade and investment factsheets (partner names beginning with W to Z)
items.summary: A snapshot of the UK’s trade and investment positions with individual trading and investment partners overseas, for partners whose name begins with W, X, Y or Z.

items.title: Official Statistics: Trade and investment factsheets (partner names beginning with T to V)
items.summary: A snapshot of the UK’s trade and investment positions with individual trading and investment partners overseas, for partners whose name begins with T, U or V.

items.title: Official Statistics: Sub-regional fuel poverty report 2026 (2024 data)
items.summary: Official statistics in development on sub-regional fuel poverty.

items.title: Guidance: Fuel poverty: sub-regional methodology and documentation
items.summary: Provides an outline of the methodology used in compiling sub-regional fuel poverty statistics.

items.title: Official Statistics: Sub-regional fuel poverty data 2026 (2024 data)
items.summary: Fuel poverty 2024 data measured as low income low energy efficiency (LILEE).

items.title: Official Statistics: Trade and investment factsheets (partner names beginning with A or B)
items.summary: A snapshot of the UK’s trade and investment positions with individual trading and investment partners overseas, for partners whose name begins with A or B.

items.title: Official Statistics: Trade and investment factsheets (partner names beginning with C to F)
items.summary: A snapshot of the UK’s trade and investment positions with individual trading and investment partners overseas, for partners whose name begins with C, D, E or F.

items.title: Official Statistics: Trade and investment factsheets (partner names beginning with G to I)
items.summary: A snapshot of the UK’s trade and investment positions with individual trading and investment partners overseas, for partners whose name begins with G, H or I.

items.title: Official Statistics: Trade and investment factsheets (partner names beginning with S)
items.summary: A snapshot of the UK’s trade and investment positions with individual trading and investment partners overseas, for partners whose name begins with S.

items.title: Official Statistics: Trade and investment factsheets (partner names beginning with P to R)
items.summary: A snapshot of the UK’s trade and investment positions with individual trading and investment partners overseas, for partners whose name begins with P, Q or R.

items.title: Official Statistics: Trade and investment factsheets (partner names beginning with M to O)
items.summary: A snapshot of the UK’s trade and investment positions with individual trading and investment partners overseas, for partners whose name begins with M, N or O.

items.title: Official Statistics: Trade and investment factsheets (partner names beginning with J to L)
items.summary: A snapshot of the UK’s trade and investment positions with individual trading and investment partners overseas, for partners whose name begins with J, K or L.

items.title: Official Statistics: Trade and investment factsheets: latest update
items.summary: The most up to date snapshot of the UK’s trade and investment positions with trading partners overseas.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Energy Trends: UK renewables
items.summary: Data on the UK’s renewables sector, including capacity, electricity generation and liquid biofuels consumption.

items.title: Great Ideas – York and North Yorkshire
items.summary: A fully funded innovation support programme, with access to innovation grants of up to £60,000.
